description: Curated finished-video pipelines for product promos, motion graphics, and talking-head rough cuts.

pipelines.name: baseline Remotion agent
pipelines.author: Remotion
pipelines.summary_zh: 使用官方 Remotion 创建 Skill 与主 Agent 从产品 brief、页面和素材生成完整宣传片，作为 React/Remotion 路线基线。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses the official Remotion creation skill plus the main agent to produce a finished product promo as the React/Remotion baseline.

pipelines.name: HyperFrames product launch
pipelines.author: HeyGen
pipelines.summary_zh: 使用 HyperFrames 的 product-launch-video 工作流，以 HTML、CSS 和可 seek 动画生成确定性产品发布视频。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses HyperFrames product-launch-video with HTML, CSS, and seekable animation for a deterministic product launch video.

pipelines.name: video-shotcraft
pipelines.author: Vincentwei1021
pipelines.summary_zh: 使用镜头配方卡、真实页面截图、2.5D 运镜和声音设计生成更强调电影感的产品宣传片。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses shot recipe cards, real page captures, 2.5D camera moves, and sound design for a cinematic product promo.

pipelines.name: baseline Remotion motion graphics
pipelines.author: Remotion
pipelines.summary_zh: 使用官方 Remotion 创建 Skill 与主 Agent，把文字、数据或 UI brief 转成可重复渲染的 React 动效视频基线。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses the official Remotion creation skill and main agent for a repeatable React-based motion-graphics baseline.

pipelines.name: HyperFrames motion graphics
pipelines.author: HeyGen
pipelines.summary_zh: 使用 HyperFrames motion-graphics 工作流生成短时长、设计驱动、可精确定位的 HTML 原生动效。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses HyperFrames motion-graphics for short, design-led, precisely timed HTML-native motion graphics.

pipelines.name: Remotion Bits enhanced motion
pipelines.author: av
pipelines.summary_zh: 调用 Remotion Bits 的动画文字、转场和场景组件，比较组件化动效路线的完成度和可复用性。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses Remotion Bits animated text, transitions, and scene components to compare a component-driven motion workflow.

pipelines.name: auto-editor deterministic rough cut
pipelines.author: WyattBlue
pipelines.summary_zh: 基于静音、音量和运动规则做确定性口播粗剪，作为可复现的工具型 baseline。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses silence, audio-level, and motion rules for a deterministic and reproducible talking-head rough-cut baseline.

pipelines.name: local Whisper video editing
pipelines.author: maxazure
pipelines.summary_zh: 使用本地 Whisper 转写、分句、字幕和片段合并处理口播或 vlog，适合隐私敏感和中文素材。
pipelines.summary_en: Uses local Whisper transcription, sentence splitting, subtitles, and clip merging for privacy-friendly talk or vlog editing.

pipelines.name: video-use cut-only
pipelines.author: browser-use
pipelines.summary_zh: 把 video-use 限定为 cut-only 模式，只允许根据转写和语义生成粗剪决策，不加入 B-roll、包装或重写。
pipelines.summary_en: Restricts video-use to cut-only mode: transcript-aware semantic rough cuts without B-roll, visual packaging, or script rewriting.

pipelines.name: chengfeng talking-head rough cut
pipelines.author: Agentchengfeng
pipelines.summary_zh: 中文审核型口播粗剪路线，强调转写稿审阅、删改清单和人工确认，目前作为实验候选。
pipelines.summary_en: Chinese review-oriented talking-head rough cut focused on transcript review and auditable deletion decisions; currently experimental.
